column1: m5.1 As a User, I want to send money to other accounts within the same bank (On Us).

column2: Verify that the user can successfully send money to another account within the same bank
column4:
1. The user is logged in and on the mobile banking home screen.
2. The recipient’s account number is valid and active within the same bank.
column5:
1.  Tap the "Send Money" button on the home screen.
2. Select "Bank Name (Same bank)" option.
3. Enter a valid recipient account number
4. Tap "Next".
5. Enter a valid amount.
6. (Optional) Enter transfer notes
7. Tap "Next" 
8. Review the transfer summary page (sender and recipient name, bank name, amount, fee, reference number, notes).
9. Tap "Confirm" to proceed.
10. Enter the OTP sent via SMS/email.
11. Review the Confirmation Page, then tap "Done".
12. View the transaction history.
column6:
1. The system processes the transfer in real-time.
2. A success message is displayed.
3. The following details are shown on the confirmation screen:
✅ Success message
- Amount
-Recipient Name & Bank Name
-Sender Name & Bank Name
-Transfer Fee
-Reference Number
-Transfer Notes (if any)

5. The transaction is recorded in the user's transaction history.
6. The user is redirected to the Home page. 
7. The updated balance of the account should be correctly reflected.

column2: Verify that the user can send money to a recent recipient
column4:
1. The user is logged in and on the mobile banking home screen.
2. The recipient’s account number is valid and active within the same bank.
3. There is a history of past successful transactions to same-bank recipients.
column5:
1. Tap the "Send Money" button on the home screen.
2. Select "Bank Name (Same bank)" option.
3. Tap on a recipient from the Recent Recipients section.
4. Tap "Next".
5. Enter a valid amount.
6. (Optional) Enter transfer notes.
7. Tap "Next".
8. Review the transfer summary page.
9. Tap "Confirm" to proceed.
10. Enter the OTP sent via SMS/email.
11. Review the confirmation page, then tap "Done".
12. View the transaction history.
column6:
1. The system should only display recent recipients that are affiliated with the same bank.
2. The recipient's details are automatically populated.
3. The system processes the transfer in real-time.
4. A success message is displayed.
5. The following details are shown on the confirmation screen:
✅ Success message
- Amount
-Recipient Name & Bank Name
-Sender Name & Bank Name
-Transfer Fee
-Reference Number
-Transfer Notes (if any)

7. The transaction is recorded in the user's transaction history.
8. The user is redirected to the Home page.
9. The updated balance of the account should be correctly reflected.

column2: Verify validation message for incorrect OTP upon sending money
column4:
1. The user is on the OTP entry screen (after confirming transfer summary).
2. The previously received OTP has expired or the 1-minute OTP cooldown is complete.
column5: 1. Enter an invalid or expired OTP in the verification screen.
column6:
1. The system should display a validation message: 

“OTP is either Invalid or has expired, Please try again or request a new OTP”

column2: Verify validation message for expired OTP upon sending money
column4:
1. The user is on the OTP entry screen (after confirming transfer summary).
2. The previously received OTP has expired.
column5:
1. Attempt to enter the expired OTP and submit.
2. Observe the validation response.
column6:
1. The system should display a validation message: 

“OTP is either Invalid or has expired, Please try again or request a new OTP”

column2: Verify that the user cannot request a new OTP upon send money before the 1-minute cooldown period has passed
column4:
1. The mobile app is launched.
2. The user is on the OTP screen during send money flow.
3. The 1-minute OTP cooldown has not passed yet.
column5: 1. Tap on the "Resend code" link.
column6:
1. "Resend code" should be disabled. 
2. No new OTP should be generated or sent.
3. The cooldown timer should continue until it completes the full 1-minute duration.

column2: Verify that the user can request a new OTP upon sending money
column4:
1. The mobile app is launched.
2. The user is on the OTP screen during send money flow.
3. The previously received OTP has expired or the 1-minute OTP cooldown is complete.
column5:
1. Tap on the "Resend code" link.
2. Check the received email to confirm a new OTP has been sent.
3. On the OTP screen, enter the newly received OTP.
column6:
1. The system should display a prompt indicating that a new OTP has been sent to the registered email address.
2. The newly generated OTP should be received via email.
3. The user should be able to enter OTP and be redirected to transfer result screen.

column2: Verify if previously received OTP is not valid upon sending money
column4:
1. The mobile app is launched.
2. The user is on the OTP screen during send money flow.
column5:
1. Tap on the "Resend code" link.
2. Check the received email to confirm a new OTP has been sent.
3. Attempt to enter the previously received OTP.
4. Observe the system response.
5. Repeat steps 1-4.
column6:
1. The system should display a validation message: 

“OTP is either Invalid or has expired, Please try again or request a new OTP”

2. Every request of new OTP will trigger all previously requested OTP to be invalid.

column2: Verify validation on the 5th failed OTP attempt (triggering max allowed attempts error)
column4:
1. The mobile app is launched.
2. The user is on the OTP screen during send money flow.
3. The system allows a maximum of 5 OTP attempts per session.
column5:
1. On the OTP screen, enter an invalid OTP for 4 times
2. On the 5th attempt, enter an invalid OTP again.
3. Observe the system behavior immediately after the 5th invalid entry.
4. Click" Ok"
column6:
1. Immediately after the 5th invalid OTP attempt, the system should display:
"Verification Failed: You have reached the maximum number of attempts. For your security, we’re redirecting you to the previous page."

2. The user should be redirected back to the confirmation screen.

column2: Verify validation on 5th OTP input attempt across multiple resend requests
column4:
1. The mobile app is launched.
2. The user is on the OTP screen during send money flow.
3. The system allows only 5 total OTP input attempts per session, regardless of resend count.
column5:
1. Enter 2 invalid OTPs (Attempts 1 & 2).
2. Tap "Resend code".
3. Enter 2 more invalid OTPs (Attempts 3 & 4).
4. Tap "Resend code" again.
5. Enter one more invalid OTP (Attempt 5).
6. Observe the system behavior immediately after the 5th invalid entry.
7. Click" Ok"
column6:
1. Immediately after the 5th invalid OTP attempt, the system should display:

"Verification Failed: You have reached the maximum number of attempts. For your security, we’re redirecting you to the previous page."

2. The user should be redirected back to the confirmation of amount screen.

column2:
Verify validation when OTP session expires before max attempts 

(When the User has reached Session ID timeout without reaching the max input attempts.)
column4:
1. User has attempted to send money and OTP session started
2. User is on the OTP verification screen.
column5:
1. Within 5 mins, input invalid OTP for 3 times
2. After 5 mins when the OTP session expires, regardless of validity input an OTP (4th attempt)
3. Tap on "Resend Code"
4. Tap on "Request New Code" button.
column6:
1. On the 4th OTP input attempt after session expiry, the system should display:

“OTP is either invalid or has expired. Please try again or request a new OTP.”

2. After tapping the "Resend Code" link, the system should show:

“OTP Expired: Your one-time password has expired. Request a new code to continue.”

3. After tapping the "Request New Code" button:

- The user should be redirected back to the confirmation of amount screen..

- A new OTP session should be required to continue the send money process.

column2: Verify that the system displays the correct error modal when an invalid or valid OTP is entered after the 5-minute OTP validity window has expired.
column4:
1. User is on the OTP verification screen.
2. An OTP has already been generated.
3. The 5-minute OTP validity window has expired.
column5:
1. Wait until the OTP validity period exceeds 5 minutes.
2. Enter a valid or invalid OTP.
3. Observe the system behavior.
4. Tap the OK button on the modal.
column6:
1. System does not proceed with OTP verification.
2. An error modal is displayed with the message:
“OTP is either invalid or has expired. Please try again or request a new OTP.”
3. The modal displays an OK button.
4. Tapping OK redirects the user to the previous screen.

column2: Verify if user can send money with insufficient funds
column4:
1. The user is logged in and on the mobile banking home screen.
2. The recipient’s account number is valid and active within the same bank.
column5:
1.  Tap the "Send Money" button on the home screen.
2. Select "Bank Name (Same bank)" option.
3. Enter a valid recipient account number, then tap "Next".
4. Enter an amount exceeding the available balance.
column6:
1. An error message is displayed in red text:

“Maximum amount is <current balance>."

column2: Verify that the user can edit the transfer amount after an insufficient funds error
column4:
1. The user is logged in and on the mobile banking home screen.
2. The recipient’s account number is valid and active within the same bank.
3. The user received an insufficient funds error
column5:
1. Enter a new amount that is within available balance.
2. Tap "Next" again, review the updated transfer summary.
3. Tap "Confirm", enter OTP, and complete the transaction.
column6:
1. The system accepts the new amount and proceeds with the transaction.
2. No further insufficient funds error occurs if the new amount is valid.
3.  The transaction completes successfully.

column2: Verify Transaction failed error validation when there's something wrong in the OTP endpoint
column4:
1. User has attempted to send money and OTP session started
2. User is on the OTP verification screen.
column5:
1. Input valid otp
2. Simulate a system error specific for OTP or RCBC down during a transaction
column6: 1. User should get redirected to Transaction Failed error screen
column9:
Note: This is very edge case scenario and hard to simulate
Most likely to be encountered in external transaction when RCBC is down

column2: Verify that the user's email is blocked for 30 minutes after 3 unverified send money sessions with 5 invalid attempts per session
column4:
1. The email is currently not blocked.
2. The user has not started any Send Money session prior.
column5:
1. Initiate Send Money Session #1
 - Enter 5 incorrect OTP(s)
2. Initiate Send Money Session #2 by clicking "Confirm"
 - Enter 5 incorrect OTP(s)
3. Initiate Send Money Session #3 by clicking "Confirm"
 - Enter 5 incorrect OTP(s)

4. Click "Confirm" and observe the system response.
5. Attempt to initiate Send Money Session #4 by clicking "Confirm"
6. Click "OK"
column6:
1. After the 3rd unverified send money session, if all 3 occurred within 10 minutes, the system blocks the user's email for 30 minutes.

2. When "Confirm" is clicked after the 3rd unverified session, an error message is displayed:
"You have exceeded the maximum number of OTP attempts. You can try again in 29 mins."

3. Any attempt in clicking "Send Money" from the homepage during the block period should return an error message:

"Send Money is currently unavailable. You can try again in <time remaining> minutes."

4. Clicking "OK" will redirect the user to the home page

5. Email is sent to the customer:
Subject: Security Notice: Unusual Activity Detected on Your Account

Body:
Hi <Customer Name>,

We noticed several attempts to access your account that exceeded our security limits. To help keep your account safe, we’ve temporarily locked it as a precaution.

If these attempts were made by you, no further action is needed. You can try signing in again after the cooldown period. If you need immediate access, please contact <replace customer support email> for assistance with resetting your account.

column2: Verify that a user receives a blocking error message when trying to send money with an email address that is currently blocked.
column4: 1. The user's email has been blocked due to failed OTP attempts
column5:
1. During the 30-minute blocking period, attempt to send money using the blocked email address multiple times.
2. Observe the system’s response.
column6:
1. System does not proceed with OTP generation.

2. A clear error message is displayed indicating the email is blocked:

"Send Money is currently unavailable. You can try again in <time remaining> minutes."

3. Each time the user attempts to send money while the email is still blocked, the system displays the same error message, with the remaining block time updated accordingly.

column2: Verify that a user can send money successfully with a valid OTP after the 30-minute block period has expired.
column4: 1. The user's email was blocked and 30 minutes have passed.
column5:
1. Wait until 30 minutes have passed since the block was applied.
2. Attempt to send money using the same email.
3. Enter the correct OTP.
column6:
1. Send money process resumes normally.
2. OTP is sent and validated successfully.
3. Transfer is successful..

column2: Verify that the system does not block the user if they input a valid OTP on the 5th attempt during the 3rd send money session
column4:
1. User is registered.
2. Two previous send money sessions have already occurred, both unverified and/or expired.
5. Each session allows up to 5 OTP attempts.
column5:
1. Initiate send money Session #3
2. Enter 4 incorrect OTPs.
3. On the 5th attempt, enter the correct OTP.
4. Observe the outcome of the session.
5. Attempt to initiate send money Session #4.
column6:
1. Session #3 is considered verified.
2. Blocking is not triggered (since only 2 sessions were unverified in last 10 minutes).
3. Session #4 starts normally.
4. User is not blocked.

column2: Verify that the counter resets after successful verification of any send money session
column4:
1. User is registered and not currently blocked.
2. Each OTP session allows a maximum of 5 attempts.
3. Session timeout is 5 minutes.
4. Blocking occurs only after 3 unverified sessions within 15 minutes.
5. Two previous send money sessions have already occurred, both unverified and/or expired.
column5:
1. Initiate send money Session #3
2. Enter 4 incorrect OTPs.
3. On the 5th attempt, enter the correct OTP.
4. Observe the outcome of the session.
5. 1. Initiate send money Session #4
 - Leave the OTP input field blank
 - Cancel the OTP verification and go back to login page.

2. Initiate send money Session #5
 - Leave the OTP input field blank
 - Cancel the OTP verification and go back to login page.

3. Initiate send money Session #6
 - Leave the OTP input field blank
 - Cancel the OTP verification and go back to login page.

4. Attempt to initiate send money Session #7 using the same email."
column6:
1. Send money sessions 4-6 are counted as new failures.
2. No blocking should occur on session #6 because the previous two failures (1 & 2) were cleared due to the successful verification in #3.
3. Blocking would only occur if 3 new unverified sessions happen after a successful one - within a new 15-minute window so in this case on Session 7
4. On Session 7, a clear error message is displayed indicating the email is blocked:

"Send Money is currently unavailable. You can try again in <time remaining> minutes."

column2: Verify that the system does not block the user if the 3 unverified send money sessions span more than 10 minutes
column4:
1.User is registered.
2. Email is not currently blocked.
3. Blocking occurs only after 3 unverified sessions within 10 minutes.
column5:
1. Start send money Session #1
 - Time: 00:00:00
 - Enter 2 incorrect OTPs then exit
 - Ends at: 00:03:00 min

2. Start send money Session #2
 - Time: 00:03:00 min
 - Request OTP.
 - Enter 2 incorrect OTPs then exit
 - Ends at: 00:05:00 min

3. Wait for 5 mins
 - Time: 00:05:00 min
 - Ends at 00:10:00 min

4. Start Send money Session #3
- Time: 00:11:00 min
- Enter incorrect OTPs then exit.
- Ends at: 00:15:00 mins

5. Start send money Session #4
 - Time: 00:15:00 or 00:16:00  min
 - Attempt to initiate send money session using the same email.
column6:
1. The system does not block the user.

2. The system evaluates the previous sessions:

 - Session #1: ended at 00:05

 - Session #3: started at 00:16 → more than 15 minutes since #1 ended

Therefore, the 3 unverified sessions do not fall within a 15-minute window.

3. Session #4 is allowed.

4. OTP is sent normally.

5. No blocking error is shown.

column2: Verify that the user can successfully send money to another bank
column4:
1. User is logged into the mobile banking application.
2. User has sufficient balance in the selected account.
3. Recipient’s bank account is valid and active.
column5:
1. Tap the "Send" button on the home screen.
2. Select "Other Bank" option.
3. Scroll down to search for bank or enter bank name in search bar
4. Select the bank
5. the Enter a valid recipient account number
6. tap "Next".
7. Enter a valid amount.
8. (Optional) Enter transfer notes.
9. Tap "Next".
10. Review the transfer summary.
11. Tap "Confirm".
12. Enter the OTP received via SMS/email.
13. Review the Transfer Result and tap "Done".
14. If transfer is still pending, tap "Refresh" button to get the updated status.
15. View the transaction history.
column6:
1. The system should only display recent recipients that are affiliated with the other bank.
2. The recipient's details are automatically populated.
3. The system processes the transfer in real-time.
4. The following details are shown on the Transfer Result screen:
Trasfer Status
- Total Amount (Transfer amount + service fee 15 php)
-Recipient Name and Account Number
-Sender Name
-Transfer Fee
-Reference Number
- Instapay Reference Number
-Transfer Notes (if any)
5. Status changes from "Transfer Pending" to "Transfer Successful"
6. The transaction is recorded in the user's transaction history.
7. The updated balance of the account should be correctly reflected.

column2: Verify validation on the 5th failed OTP attempt (triggering max allowed attempts error)
column4:
1. The mobile app is launched.
2. The user is on the OTP screen during send money flow.
3. The system allows a maximum of 5 OTP attempts per session.
column5:
1. On the OTP screen, enter an invalid OTP for 4 times
2. On the 5th attempt, enter an invalid OTP again.
3. Observe the system behavior immediately after the 5th invalid entry.
4. Click" Ok"
column6:
1. Immediately after the 5th invalid OTP attempt, the system should display:
"Verification Failed: You have reached the maximum number of attempts. For your security, we’re redirecting you to the previous page."

2. The user should be redirected back to the confirmation screen.

column2: Verify validation on 5th OTP input attempt across multiple resend requests
column4:
1. The mobile app is launched.
2. The user is on the OTP screen during send money flow.
3. The system allows only 5 total OTP input attempts per session, regardless of resend count.
4. The user has reached the OTP verification screen during send money flow.
column5:
1. Enter 2 invalid OTPs (Attempts 1 & 2).
2. Tap "Resend code".
3. Enter 2 more invalid OTPs (Attempts 3 & 4).
4. Tap "Resend code" again.
5. Enter one more invalid OTP (Attempt 5).
6. Observe the system behavior immediately after the 5th invalid entry.
7. Click" Ok"
column6:
1. Immediately after the 5th invalid OTP attempt, the system should display:

"Verification Failed: You have reached the maximum number of attempts. For your security, we’re redirecting you to the previous page."

2. The user should be redirected back to the confirmation of amount screen.

column2:
Verify validation when OTP session expires before max attempts 

(When the User has reached Session ID timeout without reaching the max input attempts.)
column4:
1. User has attempted to send money and OTP session started
2. User is on the OTP verification screen.
column5:
1. Within 5 mins, input invalid OTP for 3 times
2. After 5 mins when the OTP session expires, regardless of validity input an OTP (4th attempt)
3. Tap on "Resend Code"
4. Tap on "Request New Code" button.
column6:
1. On the 4th OTP input attempt after session expiry, the system should display:

“OTP is either invalid or has expired. Please try again or request a new OTP.”

2. After tapping the "Resend Code" link, the system should show:

“OTP Expired: Your one-time password has expired. Request a new code to continue.”

3. After tapping the "Request New Code" button:

- The user should be redirected back to the confirmation of amount screen..

- A new OTP session should be required to continue the send money process.

column2: Verify that the system displays the correct error modal when an invalid or valid OTP is entered after the 5-minute OTP validity window has expired.

3. The 5-minute OTP validity window has expired.
column5:
1. Wait until the OTP validity period exceeds 5 minutes.
2. Enter a valid or invalid OTP.
3. Observe the system behavior.
4. Tap the OK button on the modal.
column6:
1. System does not proceed with OTP verification.
2. An error modal is displayed with the message:
“OTP is either invalid or has expired. Please try again or request a new OTP.”
3. The modal displays an OK button.
4. Tapping OK redirects the user to the previous screen.

column2: Verify if transaction fails when account number and account name do not match

column2: Verify that the user's email is blocked for 30 minutes after 3 unverified send money sessions with 5 invalid attempts per session
column4:
1.User is registered.
2. Email is not currently blocked.
column5:
1. Initiate Send Money Session #1
 - Enter 5 incorrect OTP(s)
2. Initiate Send Money Session #2 by clicking "Confirm"
 - Enter 5 incorrect OTP(s)
3. Initiate Send Money Session #3 by clicking "Confirm"
 - Enter 5 incorrect OTP(s)

4. Click "Confirm" and observe the system response.
5. Attempt to initiate Send Money Session #4 by clicking "Confirm"
6. Click "OK"
column6:
1. After the 3rd unverified send money session, if all 3 occurred within 10 minutes, the system blocks the user's email for 30 minutes.

2. When "Confirm" is clicked after the 3rd unverified session, an error message is displayed:
"You have exceeded the maximum number of OTP attempts. You can try again in 29 mins."

3. Any attempt in clicking "Send" from the homepage during the block period should return an error message:

"Send Money is currently unavailable. You can try again in <time remaining> minutes."

4. Clicking "OK" will redirect the user to the home page

5. Email is sent to the customer:
Subject: Security Notice: Unusual Activity Detected on Your Account

Body:
Hi <Customer Name>,

We noticed several attempts to access your account that exceeded our security limits. To help keep your account safe, we’ve temporarily locked it as a precaution.

If these attempts were made by you, no further action is needed. You can try signing in again after the cooldown period. If you need immediate access, please contact <replace customer support email> for assistance with resetting your account.

column6:
1. After the 3rd unverified send money session, if all 3 occurred within 10 minutes, the system blocks the user's email for 30 minutes.

2. Any attempt in clicking "Send" from the homepage during the block period should return an error message:

"Send Money is currently unavailable. You can try again in <time remaining> minutes."

3. Email is sent to the customer:
Subject: Security Notice: Unusual Activity Detected on Your Account

Body:
Hi <Customer Name>,

We noticed several attempts to access your account that exceeded our security limits. To help keep your account safe, we’ve temporarily locked it as a precaution.

If these attempts were made by you, no further action is needed. You can try signing in again after the cooldown period. If you need immediate access, please contact <replace customer support email> for assistance with resetting your account.

column2: Verify that a user receives a blocking error message when trying to send money with an email address that is currently blocked.
column4: 1. The user's email has been blocked due to failed OTP attempts
column5:
1. During the 30-minute blocking period, attempt to send money using the blocked email address multiple times.
2. Observe the system’s response.
column6:
1. System does not proceed with OTP generation.

2. A clear error message is displayed indicating the email is blocked:

"Send Money is currently unavailable. You can try again in <time remaining> minutes."

3. Each time the user attempts to send money while the email is still blocked, the system displays the same error message, with the remaining block time updated accordingly.

column2: Verify that a user can send money successfully with a valid OTP after the 30-minute block period has expired.
column4: 1. The user's email was blocked and 30 minutes have passed.
column5:
1. Wait until 30 minutes have passed since the block was applied.
2. Attempt to send money using the same email.
3. Enter the correct OTP.
column6:
1. Send money process resumes normally.
2. OTP is sent and validated successfully.
3. Transfer is successful..

column2: Verify that the system does not block the user if they input a valid OTP on the 5th attempt during the 3rd send money session
column4:
1. User is registered.
2. Two previous send money sessions have already occurred, both unverified and/or expired.
5. Each session allows up to 5 OTP attempts.
column5:
1. Initiate send money Session #3
2. Enter 4 incorrect OTPs.
3. On the 5th attempt, enter the correct OTP.
4. Observe the outcome of the session.
5. Attempt to initiate send money Session #4.
column6:
1. Session #3 is considered verified.
2. Blocking is not triggered (since only 2 sessions were unverified in last 10 minutes).
3. Session #4 starts normally.
4. User is not blocked.

column2: Verify that the counter resets after successful verification of any send money session
column4:
1. User is registered and not currently blocked.
2. Each OTP session allows a maximum of 5 attempts.
3. Session timeout is 5 minutes.
4. Blocking occurs only after 3 unverified sessions within 15 minutes.
5. Two previous send money sessions have already occurred, both unverified and/or expired.
column5:
1. Initiate send money Session #3
2. Enter 4 incorrect OTPs.
3. On the 5th attempt, enter the correct OTP.
4. Observe the outcome of the session.
5. 1. Initiate send money Session #4
 - Leave the OTP input field blank
 - Cancel the OTP verification and go back to home page.

2. Initiate send money Session #5
 - Leave the OTP input field blank
 - Cancel the OTP verification and go back to home page.

3. Initiate send money Session #6
 - Leave the OTP input field blank
 - Cancel the OTP verification and go back to home page.

4. Attempt to initiate send money Session #7 using the same email."
column6:
1. Send money sessions 4-6 are counted as new failures.
2. No blocking should occur on session #6 because the previous two failures (1 & 2) were cleared due to the successful verification in #3.
3. Blocking would only occur if 3 new unverified sessions happen after a successful one - within a new 15-minute window so in this case on Session 7
4. On Session 7, a clear error message is displayed indicating the email is blocked:

"Send Money is currently unavailable. You can try again in <time remaining> minutes."

column2: Verify that the system does not block the user if the 3 unverified send money sessions span more than 10 minutes
column4:
1.User is registered.
2. Email is not currently blocked.
3. Blocking occurs only after 3 unverified sessions within 10 minutes.
column5:
1. Start send money Session #1
 - Time: 00:00:00
 - Enter 2 incorrect OTPs then exit
 - Ends at: 00:03:00 min

2. Start send money Session #2
 - Time: 00:03:00 min
 - Request OTP.
 - Enter 2 incorrect OTPs then exit
 - Ends at: 00:05:00 min

3. Wait for 5 mins
 - Time: 00:05:00 min
 - Ends at 00:10:00 min

4. Start Send money Session #3
- Time: 00:11:00 min
- Enter incorrect OTPs then exit.
- Ends at: 00:15:00 mins

5. Start send money Session #4
 - Time: 00:15:00 or 00:16:00  min
 - Attempt to initiate send money session using the same email.
column6:
1. The system does not block the user.

2. The system evaluates the previous sessions:

 - Session #1: ended at 00:05

 - Session #3: started at 00:16 → more than 15 minutes since #1 ended

Therefore, the 3 unverified sessions do not fall within a 15-minute window.

3. Session #4 is allowed.

4. OTP is sent normally.

5. No blocking error is shown.

column2: Verify Transfer Result Screen when transaction failed due to external error
column4:
1. The user is logged in and on the mobile banking home screen.
2. The recipient’s account number is valid and active within the same bank.
3. There is a history of past successful transactions to same-bank recipients.
4. An external error causes the transaction to fail.
column5:
1. Tap the "Send" button on the home screen.
2. Select "Other Bank" option.
3. Scroll down to search for bank or enter bank name in search bar
4. Select the bank
5.  Select a recipient or enter recipient account details
6. tap "Next".
7. Enter a valid amount.
8. (Optional) Enter transfer notes.
9. Tap "Next".
10. Review the transfer summary.
11. Tap "Confirm".
12. Enter the OTP received via SMS/email.
13. Review the Transfer Result and tap "Done".
14. If transfer is still pending, tap "Refresh" button to get the updated status.
15. View the transaction history.
column6:
1. The following details should be shown on the Transfer Result screen:
-Transfer Status
-Total Amount (Transfer amount + service fee of PHP 15)
-Recipient Name and Account Number
-Sender Name
-Transfer Fee
-Reference Number
-InstaPay Reference Number
-Transfer Notes (if any)
2. The status should change from "Transfer Pending" to "Transfer Failed".
3. The transaction should not be recorded in the user's transaction history.
4. The account balance should be correctly reflected and should not be deducted, since the transaction failed to send.

- Amount
-Recipient Name & Bank Name
-Sender Name & Bank Name
-Transfer Fee
-Reference Number
-Transfer Notes (if any)

7. The transaction is recorded in the user's transaction history.
8. The user is redirected to the Home page.
9. The updated balance of the account should be correctly reflected.

Body: Camera access is required to scan QR codes. Please enable camera permissions in Settings.
3. The QR scanner does not open.
4. The user is prevented from proceeding with QR scanning until camera access is enabled.

4. Scan a QR code that is not supported by Higala.
5. Tap OK on the error prompt.
column6:

2. An error prompt is displayed with the following details:

Header: Unsupported QR Code

Body: This QR code format is not supported.
3. The user is prevented from proceeding with the transaction.
4. The user remains on the QR scanning screen and may scan a different, supported QR code.

column1: m5.7 As a User, I want to send money to my other savings account

column2: Verify that the user can successfully send money to another of their own savings accounts
column4:
1. User is logged into the mobile app.
2. User has at least two active savings accounts with sufficient balance in the source account.
column5:
1.  Tap the "Send Money" button on the home screen.
2. Select "Bank Name (Same bank)" option.
3. Enter the account number of the other savings account
4. Tap "Next".
5. Enter a valid amount.
6. (Optional) Enter transfer notes
7. Tap "Next" 
8. Review the transfer summary page (sender and recipient name, bank name, amount, fee, reference number, notes).
9. Tap "Confirm" to proceed.
10. Enter the OTP sent via SMS/email.
11. Review the Confirmation Page, then tap "Done".
12. View the transaction history.
column6:
"1. The system processes the transfer in real-time.
2. A success message is displayed.
3. The following details are shown on the confirmation screen:
✅ Success message
- Amount
-Recipient Name & Bank Name
-Sender Name & Bank Name
-Transfer Fee
-Reference Number
-Transfer Notes (if any)

4. User is redirected to the Home page.
5. The transaction is reflected in the home page.
6. Account A balance is correctly deducted.

column2: Verify that when switching to the recipient savings account, the transaction is reflected and the balance is updated
column4:
1. The user has successfully transferred money from Account A to Account B.

2. The user is on the Home screen.
column5:
1. Observe the current balance of Account A (Sender).
2. Switch Account to view the homepage of Account B (Recipient).
3. Observe the balance of Account B.
4. Scroll down to the Transaction History section of Account B.
column6:
1. The balance of Account A correctly reflects the deducted amount and fees.
2. Upon switching, Account B displays the updated balance (Previous Balance + Transferred Amount).
3. The transaction history in the home page for Account B displays a "Credit" entry with the correct amount and a timestamp of the recent transfer.
4. The UI transitions smoothly without showing stale data from the previous account.

column2: Verify transaction history and details for the Sender Account (Account A)
column4:
1. The transfer from m5.7.1 is successful.
2. User is on the Home page viewing Account A.
column5:
1. Tap the "History" icon in the footer.
2. Locate the most recent transaction entry.
3. Tap the entry to view Transaction Details.
column6:
1. A "Debit" entry for the transfer amount is recorded.
2. Transaction Details show: 
To (Account B Name/Number) 
Bank Name
Date/Timestamp 
Transaction ID
Notes.
3. Data matches the information from the confirmation screen.

column2: Verify transaction history and details for the Recipient Account (Account B)
column4:
1. The transfer from m5.7.1 is successful.
2. User is on the Home page.
column5:
1. Switch the dashboard view to Account B (Recipient).
2. Verify that the Available Balance has increased by the transfer amount.
3. Tap the "History" icon.
4. Locate the most recent entry and tap to view Transaction Details.
column6:
1. Account B balance is updated instantly.
2. A "Credit" entry for the transfer amount is recorded.
3. Transaction Details show: 
From (Account A Name)
Sender Bank
Date/Timestamp
Transaction ID (must match Account A)Notes.
4. No stale data from Account A is visible in the Account B context.

column1: m5.8 As a User, I want to send money from Rural Bank San Antonio to Rural Bank of Abucay (RB-to-RB External / Cash In).

column4:

4. Abucay recipient acct: 7710501333354703.
